_comment: Act 3 / Challenge 3.3 — OEMC Blackout (voice triage). Loaded by beacon at /spiffs/challenge_3_3.json. Also consumed by sim/.

voice._comment: When on-badge caps.voice is false the beacon captures audio via its own mic or sim stdin and uploads via upload_endpoint, then passes the returned ref in VOICE_CAPTURE_SUBMIT.ref. on_badge_fallback=true means the Lua screen sends an empty VOICE_CAPTURE_SUBMIT to signal 'player is ready'; the beacon drives the capture + upload cycle and pushes VOICE_RESULT back.

priority_categories.label: Priority 1
priority_categories.description: Immediate life threat — lights and sirens

sim._comment: sim uses these transcripts in order when STT_PROVIDER=mock, one per triage call. Indices match TRIAGE_CALLS order in content/act3-3-oemc-blackout.ts.

custom.landmark: Office of Emergency Management and Communications (simulated)
custom._comment: display_call_on_screen=true tells the badge/sim to display the call description text on-screen in addition to speaking it, since not all players may catch every spoken word.
